channel.title: RoundSignal - Weekly funded-startup signals
channel.description: Each week: freshly-funded startups, the role to contact, and a ready-to-send angle.

item.title: RoundSignal 2026-W30: 9 freshly-funded accounts to sell to this week
item.description:
RoundSignal Issue 2026-W30

Freshly-funded B2B SaaS & tech startups (pre-seed -> Series B)

9 trigger-ready accounts, scored and contextualized.

telli

heat 88

Trigger: €13.1M ($15M) Seed round led by redalpine, total funding now €16.1M (EU-Startups & Tech.eu, as of 23 Jul 2026)

Why now: Corroborated across two sources, this Berlin AI startup just closed a sizeable seed and will be hiring and scaling GTM fast — prime window for RevOps, growth and recruiting services.

Who to contact: Head of Growth / COO · hello@telli.com

Angle: Reference their move to run customer-facing ops for B2C clients and offer to stand up the outbound/RevOps tooling their new AI product will need to demo at scale.

Best-touch window: reach out before ~Aug 20 — the signal decays within weeks.

source

kausable

heat 82

Trigger: €12M Seed led by UVC Partners and Entourage, with HTGF and Mätch VC (EU-Startups & Tech.eu, as of 23 Jul 2026)

Why now: Two-source corroborated German DeepTech seed — fresh capital means engineering and brand build-out; a genuine 48h trigger for dev, design and recruiting sellers.

Who to contact: CEO / Head of Engineering

Angle: Note their reasoning-first-AI positioning and offer to help translate the technical story into a crisp brand/website ahead of their hiring push.

Best-touch window: reach out before ~Aug 20 — the signal decays within weeks.

source

Ossprey

heat 80

Trigger: $2.65M (~£2m) oversubscribed pre-seed to accelerate product and expand engineering/commercial teams (Tech.eu & UKTN, as of 22 Jul 2026)

Why now: Corroborated across two sources; explicitly raising to grow engineering AND commercial teams now — a clean fit for recruiting, dev and growth service providers.

Who to contact: Co-founder / CEO · info@ossprey.com

Angle: Point to their stated plan to build a commercial team and offer fractional RevOps/recruiting to get their first sales hires productive fast.

Best-touch window: reach out before ~Aug 20 — the signal decays within weeks.

source

Float

heat 74

Trigger: €4.5M Series A to expand AI-native finance platform for European startups (BeBeez International, as of 15 Jul 2026)

Why now: Stockholm B2B SaaS with fresh Series A explicitly expanding across Europe — will need marketing, localization and sales hiring support now.

Who to contact: CEO / Head of Marketing

Angle: Reference their European expansion and offer growth/demand-gen scoped to their new-market rollout for finance teams at startups.

Best-touch window: reach out before ~Aug 20 — the signal decays within weeks.

source

PageMind

heat 70

Trigger: €1.2M round to build e-commerce product-discovery AI platform, expand team and support international growth incl. US (Tech.eu, as of 23 Jul 2026)

Why now: Fresh Spanish B2B SaaS raise with explicit team expansion and US go-to-market — a timely opening for growth, recruiting and PR services.

Who to contact: Founder / CEO

Angle: Reference their US expansion plan and offer to build the US positioning/demand-gen motion for their e-commerce optimization platform.

Best-touch window: reach out before ~Aug 20 — the signal decays within weeks.

source

Cascade

heat 66

Trigger: $3.5M Seed led by Andreessen Horowitz Speedrun (Tech.eu, as of 21 Jul 2026)

Why now: London AI SaaS predicting engineering/construction projects, freshly seed-funded by a16z Speedrun — will scale product and GTM; fits dev, design and growth sellers.

Who to contact: Founder / CEO

Angle: Congratulate on the a16z Speedrun backing and offer to sharpen their sales collateral/website for the construction-buyer audience they now need to convert.

Best-touch window: reach out before ~Aug 20 — the signal decays within weeks.

source

Thira

heat 60

Trigger: $21M Seed round led by Madrona (My Startup World, as of 17 Jul 2026)

Why now: (unverified) Single thin source, but a $21M seed is a strong early-stage trigger that will fuel hiring and GTM build-out worth an early approach.

Who to contact: CEO / Head of People

Angle: Reference the Madrona-led seed and offer recruiting/RevOps to help spend that large seed on the right first go-to-market hires.

Best-touch window: reach out before ~Aug 20 — the signal decays within weeks.

source

StrongestLayer

heat 55

Trigger: $4.1M Seed funding extension (SecurityWeek, as of 22 Jul 2026)

Why now: (unverified) Single-source seed extension in security SaaS; fresh capital typically funds product and commercial expansion worth an early conversation.

Who to contact: Founder / CEO

Angle: Reference the seed extension and offer PR/positioning to capitalize on the security-buyer attention while the raise is still fresh news.

Best-touch window: reach out before ~Aug 20 — the signal decays within weeks.

source

Sowilo

heat 52

Trigger: Pre-seed round to expand Catecut fashion product-intelligence platform and launch its Shopify app globally (Tech.eu, as of 21 Jul 2026)

Why now: (unverified) Iceland B2B AI SaaS at pre-seed with a global Shopify app launch — early but genuine trigger for growth/app-store marketing services.

Who to contact: Founder / CEO

Angle: Offer Shopify App Store launch/ASO and demand-gen support timed to their global app release.

Best-touch window: reach out before ~Aug 20 — the signal decays within weeks.

source

© RoundSignal. Signals sourced from public news; verify before outreach.
